subtitle.ja: 向かい合った二人がはじめの構えを作って始めます。一人が右手の中指で、もう一人の右手のひらの糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Facing each other, both begin in "Position 1". One player uses the right middle finger to pick up the other player’s right-palm string.

subtitle.ja: もう一人が右手の中指で、一人目の右手のひらの糸を取ります
subtitle.en: The other player picks up the first player’s right-palm string with the right middle finger.

subtitle.ja: 同様に、左手同士で中指の糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: In the same way, use the left middle fingers to pick up each other’s palm strings.

subtitle.ja: 全ての手の親指と小指の糸を外して完成です
subtitle.en: Release all thumb and little-finger strings to show the finished figure.

subtitle.ja: お互いの右手同士、左手同士を交互にリズム良く合わせます
subtitle.en: Bring the right hands and left hands together alternately and rhythmically.
